The '''Second Battle of Endor''' was the first major battle in the [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]] invasion of [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].<ref name="M" /> It took place nearly one month after the destruction of the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]].<ref name="GMR">{{GamerCite|9|Endor and the Moddell Sector}}</ref>

==Battle==
===Buildup===
{{Quote|The more I hear about these Nagai and their allies, and the more I see of their handiwork I see, the less I like it.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="M" />}}
Although the Nagai had encountered the [[Alliance of Free Planets]] on numerous planets, such as [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], [[Skirmish on Kabray|Kabray]] and [[Skirmish on Kinooine|Kinooine]], those missions only laid the groundwork for their intended invasion of the wider galaxy. They were establishing forward [[Kinooine/Legends|bases]], and trying to capture parts of the Alliance leadership. The assault on Endor would be a strike at the very heart of the Alliance, and mark the opening of outright war between the two parties.<ref name="M" />

===Battle===
{{Quote|Mercy to the enemy isn't our way, Bey. I thought you understood that.|[[Ozrei N'takkilomandrife|Knife]] prepares to shoot [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|<ref name="M" />}}
The Alliance was alerted to the attack when sensors detected a fleet of small craft heading towards Endor. Admiral [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] and [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] put into effect their withdrawal plans, sending a wing of fighters to engage the incoming ships while the base was evacuated.<ref name="M" />

[[File:SecondBattleofEndor-SW100.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Alliance fighters engage the Nagai over Endor.]]
Meanwhile, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], who had both been deemed unfit to fly, set out to investigate a disturbance in the forest that had been reported by the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Tippet/Legends|Tippet]]. They found a squad of [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]] and [[Maccabree]] preparing to attack the Alliance base, covered by the diversion taking place in space. Luke set off to warn the base, while Han dueled with a Maccabree warrior.<ref name="M" />

In space, the Alliance ships were being slaughtered by the Nagai squadron, led by [[Lumiya]], thanks to the Alliance battle plans that had been leaked to the Nagai by their double agent, [[Bey]]. By resorting to one of Han's old piloting tricks, [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] was able to drive the Nagai forces into retreat.<ref name="M" />

On the planet's surface, [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Hol B'shaki]] sent a squad of Maccabree warriors against the Alliance [[Endor tracking station|tracking station]], pinning down [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and her [[Zeltron/Legends|Zeltron]] advisors. B'shaki then led Nagai troops toward the Alliance's [[Endor Station|command center]]. Luke was able to warn Ackbar and Mothma at the main base in time to escape the attack, and the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] set off to defend [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] and her friends at the tracking station.<ref name="M" /> B'shaki's group was eventually intercepted by Rebel troops commanded by [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Bren Derlin/Legends|Bren Derlin]].<ref name="Forgotten War" />

[[File:BeyHanfight.jpg|thumb|200px|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Bey]] brawl on the forest floor.]]
Meanwhile, stranded in the jungle, Han Solo faced off against the traitor Bey. Although Bey bested Solo in hand-to-hand combat, the Nagai [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Ozrei N'takkilomandrife|Ozrei "Knife" N'takkilomandrife]] intervened—the same Nagai Han had encountered on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]—and tried to shoot Han. Bey had not wanted to kill Han and so tackled Knife, knocking the shot off target. This give Solo chance to grab his [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] and shoot Knife—he didn't miss. An anguished Bey revealed Knife was his half-brother, and allowed Han to continue on to the tracking station. By the time he arrived there, the Maccabree had been driven off by Skywalker, flying away in their flight-suits.<ref name="M" />

===Aftermath===
{{Quote|As of right now, the Alliance of Free Planets is at war again.|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="M" />}}
Although the battle was a victory for the Alliance, it was a Pyrrhic victory, marking the start of the first galactic war since the defeat of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] at [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Endor]].<ref name="M" />
